headline.text: L1 S2 shut down at *15:52* after contractors breached production area — construction debris tracked across equipment.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 shut down S2 at 15:52 when FSQA found construction contamination in production walkways and contractors attempting to exit into the plant without protocols. Twist Wrap replaced the last spare cutter gear overnight — part will only last 2-3 more racks and no inventory remains. S3 is requesting approval to switch chocolate from 10257 to 10227 as supply runs out tomorrow.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 Theegarten is back online after Preston resolved yesterday's motor fault. ML3 dancing arm bolt broke at 15:16 causing repeated film breaks — maintenance still extracting the broken piece as of 16:02. Grinding found 2 burnt Graham pieces in one incoming tote during inspection.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 had two separate Cavanna chain teeth fall off during the shift — the second at 15:32 is still active. Truffle Line discovered a new crack in a Tunnel 3 cover, separate from the prior break. MFM resolved scale vibration faults by correcting 3 incorrectly positioned linear feeders.

watchlist.reason: S2 metal detector failure from 2026-05-11 — X-ray caught metal piece but MD did not; no activity today but still no root cause identified.
Sanitizer sprayers contaminated by drain use — 4 days open, no replacement sprayers available in plant; blocks proper sanitation protocols.
ML1 metal detector belt repeatedly shifting — 2 days open with multiple stoppages on 2026-05-11; no activity today but pattern suggests alignment or tensioning problem.

notes.text: Ray from L2 walked the new Theegarten flow wrap installation with Chris and operators — first section cleaning started at 16:03.
Volker (Italu consultant) cooking 2-3 test batches of Classic Vanilla Caramel in Sollich 4 Kitchen to validate equipment before his departure.
Three pretzel loads (27,000 lb each) scheduled to arrive this week to support Pretzel Thins run through May 18.

closed_today.title: ML2 Theegarten down all shift - HMI freeze and motor fault unresolved
closed_today.resolution_comment: Preston resolved the Theegarten issue. Justin thanked him at 12:27 on 2026-05-12 — "Thanks Preston Elmer for fixing the FW yesterday!!" Line is running normally today.

closed_today.title: ML2 HMI froze during recipe change, hard reset required
closed_today.resolution_comment: Duplicate of issue #43. Preston resolved the HMI/motor fault and the line is running. Closed 2026-05-12.

closed_today.title: MFM scale vibration faults from incorrectly positioned linear feeders
closed_today.summary: Scale vibration traced to 3 incorrectly positioned linear feeders — maintenance corrected setup and re-zeroed at 20:13, vibration resolved.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Re-zeroed scales at 20:13 after Nathan corrected 3 incorrectly positioned linear feeders — "we did the rezero and its working very well"

closed_today.title: MFM print quality issue — suction cup positioned too low
closed_today.summary: Bad print from suction cup positioned too low causing ink smear — line paused at 21:30, adjusted, resumed at 21:46.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Suction cup adjusted at 21:46 — "Lines running issue was suction cup was too low causing the ink to smear"

opened_today.title: S2 line shut down for construction contamination in production area
opened_today.summary: Construction contractors breached production area with debris tracked across walkways — drain tent hole exposed, foot protocols ignored, conveyors left running; line shut down for contamination control.

opened_today.title: Twist Wrap overfilled caramel trays causing inconsistent cuts and weights
opened_today.summary: Caramel trays overfilled by second shift kitchen — causing inconsistent cuts and piece weights that affect final pouch specs; operator re-trained.

opened_today.title: ML1 Cavanna chain teeth falling off — two incidents in one shift
opened_today.summary: Two Cavanna chain teeth fell off in one shift at 14:17 and 15:32 — first was replaced, second is active; recurring failures suggest chain wear or alignment.

opened_today.title: Grinding line found 2 burnt Graham pieces in incoming tote #17
opened_today.summary: Two burnt Graham pieces found in incoming tote #17 (lot FEB1627T3A) — carbonized material discovered during third-shift inspection; previous 16 totes were clean.

opened_today.title: Truffle Line Tunnel 3 cover has new crack — separate from prior break
opened_today.summary: New crack found on a different Tunnel 3 cover — no loose plastic detected, being monitored for progression; separate from issue #36.

opened_today.title: MFM scale vibration faults from incorrectly positioned linear feeders
opened_today.summary: Scale vibration traced to 3 incorrectly positioned linear feeders — maintenance corrected setup and re-zeroed at 20:13, vibration resolved.

opened_today.title: MFM print quality issue — suction cup positioned too low
opened_today.summary: Bad print from suction cup positioned too low causing ink smear — line paused at 21:30, adjusted, resumed at 21:46.
